out-replace merge semantics

This page verifies that host classes/styles/attributes are merged into rendered element node(s).

Single rendered element

Single node keeps own style and data-kind

Multiple rendered roots

First
Second

Live inspection

Expected: - class union includes host and child classes - style union keeps child values when already set - attributes copied only when missing (data-kind stays child on article) - multi-root inherits host attrs/classes/styles on each root (including id) Single: article#single-shared-id | class=OneChild child child-a base base-style | style=border-color: #2b8; color: #163; | data-host=single | data-kind=child Multi: section#multi-shared-id | class=TwoChildren child child-a base | style=border-color: #39b; | data-host=multi | data-kind=- section#multi-shared-id | class=TwoChildren child child-b base | style=border-color: #c73; | data-host=multi | data-kind=-
